examples.eng: Jane's temperature is up again.
The temperature is 10° above zero.
The temperature is way below zero.
The nurse took (=measured) my temperature.
the normal body temperature of 98.6°F
Water boils at a temperature of 212°F.
examples.ru: Вода закипает при температуре двести двенадцать градусов Фаренгейта.

examples.eng: Are you controlling for the temperature?
Water boils at a certain temperature.
Water boils at a temperature of 100°C.
examples.ru: Вода кипит при температуре сто градусов Цельсия.

examples.eng: The temperature has fallen below zero.
The temperature has to be taken every hour.
The drop in temperature was a relief.
examples.ru: Снижение температуры привело к улучшению состояния.

examples.eng: Temperature can be measured precisely.
The temperature is carefully monitored.
At night the temperature drops below zero.
The wine should be stored at room temperature.
examples.ru: Вино должно храниться при комнатной температуре.

examples.eng: Exercise raises your body temperature.
examples.ru: В результате физических упражнений температура тела повышается.

examples.eng: The temperature soared to 100 degrees.
Lead fuses at quite a low temperature.
examples.ru: Свинец плавится при достаточно низкой температуре.

examples.eng: The temperature was too low for comfort.
The room is kept at an even temperature.
The temperature rose to the high eighties.
examples.ru: Температура поднялась почти до девяноста градусов.

examples.eng: I don't like her running this temperature.
examples.ru: Мне не нравится, что у неё такая высокая температура.

examples.eng: an inappreciable change in the temperature
We noticed a gradual change in temperature.
The temperature was up in the high forties.
The acid distills at a specific temperature.
Water solidifies by reduction of temperature.
A thermostat controls the room's temperature.
The heater has variable temperature settings.
